description: Expanded cross-domain AI case studies pack for Marion. The pack organizes landmark and practical cases across six AI domains used in Marion: foundations, agents_and_systems, ethics_and_law, psychology, cybersecurity, and marketing. Each case is framed around learning value rather than hype.

foundations.title: AlphaGo
foundations.why_it_matters: A canonical foundations case for combining learning, search, and evaluation into a single high-performance decision system.

foundations.title: AlphaGo Zero
foundations.why_it_matters: Shows how a system can improve through self-play and environment feedback rather than curated human supervision.

foundations.title: Clinical imaging workflow AI
foundations.why_it_matters: Grounds theoretical model performance in real deployment conditions where efficiency, safety, and workflow matter.

agents_and_systems.title: Generative Agents
agents_and_systems.why_it_matters: Shows how memory and reflection change agent behavior over longer horizons.

agents_and_systems.title: Voyager
agents_and_systems.why_it_matters: A strong case for embodied agents that learn reusable skills over time.

agents_and_systems.title: AutoGen-style multi-agent orchestration
agents_and_systems.why_it_matters: Useful for understanding how multi-agent systems can coordinate on complex tasks while introducing new failure modes.

ethics_and_law.title: State v. Loomis
ethics_and_law.why_it_matters: A core case for fairness, opacity, and legal accountability in automated decision systems.

ethics_and_law.title: Thaler v. Vidal
ethics_and_law.why_it_matters: Important for understanding where current patent law draws the line around AI-assisted innovation.

ethics_and_law.title: EU AI Act implementation model
ethics_and_law.why_it_matters: A contemporary policy case for how cross-sector AI governance is being operationalized.

psychology.title: Trust repair in human-machine interaction
psychology.why_it_matters: Crucial for understanding why failure recovery is psychological as well as technical.

psychology.title: Generative AI use in radiology reporting
psychology.why_it_matters: Shows how AI can affect workload, quality, and trust in real expert settings.

psychology.title: Affective computing in adaptive interfaces
psychology.why_it_matters: Helpful for framing emotion-aware systems as psychological measurement problems, not magic.

cybersecurity.title: IARPA TrojAI
cybersecurity.why_it_matters: A major defensive case for detecting compromised models before deployment.

cybersecurity.title: MITRE ATLAS applied threat mapping
cybersecurity.why_it_matters: Useful for organizing AI security knowledge in a structured operational way.

cybersecurity.title: OWASP LLM Top 10 risk scenarios
cybersecurity.why_it_matters: A practical case cluster for LLM application failure modes and defensive design.

marketing.title: Personalization at scale
marketing.why_it_matters: Shows how AI marketing value is often captured through better relevance and timing, not just automation volume.

marketing.title: Recommendation systems in e-commerce
marketing.why_it_matters: A core digital-commerce case for recommendation logic and commercial lift.

marketing.title: Generative AI in content operations
marketing.why_it_matters: Useful for understanding where genAI helps marketing teams operationally without replacing performance measurement.

notes_for_marion: Keep case studies as reasoning anchors rather than isolated anecdotes.
Tie each case to a domain trunk so Marion can generalize lessons across theory, systems, governance, psychology, cybersecurity, and commercial application.
Prefer cases with clear operational lessons over hype-heavy narratives.

strengths: Valid JSON and coherent top-level object structure.
Important retrieval accelerator because it links theory to concrete precedent and deployment patterns.
issues: Manifest pack version for caseStudies is 1.0.0 while file version is 1.1.0.
Bibliographic/source structures are present, but direct source URLs/DOIs/ISBNs are not attached in-file.
case_studies uses domain labels that do not exactly match runtime layer names; alias mapping is needed for retrieval.
recommendedActions: Attach authoritative source URLs, DOI, ISBN, or publisher identifiers to reference entries.
Keep manifest and pack versions synchronized.
Use alias routing when layer labels differ from case-study domain labels.
Preserve bibliographic references without embedding copyrighted chapters.
